task.issue: California Pass-Through Entity Tax (PTET) election deadline and mechanics.

analysis: Loaded skills/tax-research-state-income/references/states/CA.md (status: stub at v1.0.0-beta). California PTET (Cal. Rev. & Tax. Code §17052.10): election made via Form 3804 filed with the entity's annual return. Election rate: 9.3% on the elected pass-through entity tax base. Annual election; not irrevocable for future years. Owner-level credit on Schedule S of California Form 540. Federal deduction at entity level under Notice 2020-75 (avoids §164(b)(6) $10K SALT cap). Deadline: pre-payment of at least the lesser of $1,000 or 50% of the prior year PTET liability is due on or before June 15 of the tax year (Cal. Rev. & Tax. Code §19900(b)). For tax year 2024, this is June 15, 2024.
conclusion: California PTET deadline for tax year 2024: June 15, 2024 pre-payment + Form 3804 election with the 2024 entity return. Pre-payment is the LESSER of $1,000 or 50% of prior-year PTET. Annual election; non-irrevocable. Owner-level credit at California return. State confidence capped at LOW because CA per-state file is `status: stub`; recommend live retrieval from FTB website for current-year specifics.
band_rationale: Per-state file is `status: stub`; per shared/confidence-bands.md decay rule, state-tax conclusions cap at LOW until file is promoted. Federal aspects (Notice 2020-75 deductibility) at HIGH but state procedural questions require live retrieval.
